name: SupportTicket
description: Represents a customer support ticket, case, or conversation managed by a help desk or customer service platform.

id.description: Unique identifier of the ticket in the support platform.

subject.description: Short summary or subject line of the ticket.

description.description: Full description or body of the original customer request.
description.example: I clicked the password reset link but never received the confirmation email.

status.description: Current workflow state of the ticket.

priority.description: Priority level assigned to the ticket.

channel.description: Channel through which the ticket was created.

requester.description: Customer or contact who submitted the ticket.

assignee_id.description: Identifier of the agent currently assigned to the ticket.

group_id.description: Identifier of the team or group queue handling the ticket.

tags.description: Tags or labels applied to the ticket for categorization and reporting.

sla_breached.description: Whether the ticket has breached its SLA target.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the ticket was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last update to the ticket.
